ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_group" TEXT /* Group or category of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "program_website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program (if applicable) */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., accelerator, incubator) */,
  "program_focus_area" TEXT /* Focus area of the program (e.g., sustainability, education) */,
  "program_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "startups" (
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each startup */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the startup is part of */,
  "startup_name" TEXT /* Name of the startup */,
  "oneliner" TEXT /* One-liner or tagline of the startup */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the startup */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the startup was founded */,
  "origin_country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the startup */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the startup */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* Logo URL of the startup */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles of the startup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("startup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_startups_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "startup_industries" (
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the startup */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the startup operates in */,
  "primary_industry" INTEGER /* Whether this is the primary industry for the startup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("startup_id", "industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "founders" (
  "founder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each founder */,
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the startup the founder is associated with */,
  "founder_name" TEXT /* Name of the founder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the founder */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the founder (e.g., CEO, CTO) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the founder */,
  "linkedin_url" TEXT /* LinkedIn URL of the founder */,
  "twitter_url" TEXT /* Twitter URL of the founder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("founder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_founders_startup_id FOREIGN KEY ("startup_id") REFERENCES startups ("startup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding event */,
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the startup that received funding */,
  "funding_round" TEXT /* Type of funding round (e.g., seed, series A) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding received */,
  "investor" TEXT /* Name of the investor */,
  "funding_date" TEXT /* Date of the funding event */,
  "equity_stake" REAL /* Equity stake of the investor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_startup_id FOREIGN KEY ("startup_id") REFERENCES startups ("startup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_metrics" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact metric */,
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the startup the impact metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the impact metric (e.g., number of customers, revenue growth) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the impact metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact metric */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the impact metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_metrics_startup_id FOREIGN KEY ("startup_id") REFERENCES startups ("startup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, mentor, investor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the startup */,
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the startup being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_startup_id FOREIGN KEY ("startup_id") REFERENCES startups ("startup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentorship_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mentorship program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the mentorship program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the mentorship program */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the mentorship program (in weeks) */,
  "program_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the mentorship program */,
  "program_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the mentorship program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentorship_matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mentorship match */,
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the startup being mentored */,
  "mentor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mentor */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mentorship program */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the mentorship match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the mentorship match (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentorship_matches_startup_id FOREIGN KEY ("startup_id") REFERENCES startups ("startup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentorship_matches_mentor_id FOREIGN KEY ("mentor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentorship_matches_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES mentorship_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investor_network" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the startup being invested in */,
  "investor_name" TEXT /* Name of the investor */,
  "investment_stage" TEXT /* Stage of investment (e.g., seed, series A) */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount of investment */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date of investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investor_network_startup_id FOREIGN KEY ("startup_id") REFERENCES startups ("startup_id")
)
